---
title: "Sintram and his Companions and Undine By Friedrich, Baron La Motte Fouqué. With introduction by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Sintram and his Companions and Undine By Friedrich, Baron La Motte Fouqué. With introduction by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1896
**Genre:** Non-fiction: criticism
**Format:** Preface to book

**Publisher:** London: Gardner, Darton & Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
